subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 18 (Tablet to the eighteenth Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: This is a letter from the letter Thá unto the eighth temple before the ten: I testify that there is none other God but Him, the Sovereign, the Most Holy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الابد الایزول. ان هذا کتاب من عند الثآء الی هیکل الثامن قبل عشر ان اشهد انه ﻻ اله الا هو الملک القدوس
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God

writing_refs.type_name: Selections from the Writings of the Báb
